message:
feat(core,harness,e2e,vdbe,wal): connection refinements, extension matrix updates, and codegen fixes

Ongoing multi-agent development work across FrankenSQLite subsystems:
- connection.rs: further virtual table initialization and schema tracking refinements
- extension_parity_matrix.rs: additional acceptance test wiring and tag updates
- bd_t6sv2_14_extension_compatibility_matrix.rs: test case refinements
- realdb_e2e.rs: benchmark replay command formatting improvements
- perf_runner.rs: hot-path profile configuration updates
- codegen.rs: minor index codegen adjustments
- wal_fec.rs: WAL forward error correction fix

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
